languages.text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.
languages.original_text: Великий {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}стратег{/g} выбирает одну из зон {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}стратегического плана{/g}. На 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусы{/g} выбранной зоны удваиваются. Все остальные зоны исчезают: их больше нельзя использовать в этом {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ходу{/g}, но можно снова создать в следующем.

traits.locale_text: The Strategist chooses one of the Combat Tactics areas. For 1 round, the targeted area's bonuses are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this turn, but can be designated again the next round.

The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

Стратег выбирает одну из зон Стратегического плана. На 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусы{/g} выбранной зоны удваиваются. Все остальные зоны исчезают: их больше нельзя использовать в этом {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ходу{/g}, но можно снова создать в следующем.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}战略大师{/g}选择一片{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}战斗策略{/g}区域。目标区域的{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}翻倍，持续一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。所有其他策略区域都会解除效果，且本{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}无法使用，不过可以在下一轮时再次指定。
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

traits.locale_text: 战略大师选择一片战斗策略区域。目标区域的{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}翻倍，持续一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。所有其他策略区域都会解除效果，且本{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}无法使用，不过可以在下一轮时再次指定。

languages.text: El {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}gran estratega{/g} elige una de las zonas designadas por {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tácticas de combate{/g}. Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, las {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificaciones{/g} de la zona elegida se duplican. Todas las demás zonas tácticas se anulan y no pueden utilizarse en este {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, pero podrán volver a designarse en el próximo asalto.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

traits.locale_text: El gran {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}estratega{/g} elige una de las zonas designadas por Tácticas de combate. Durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, las {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificaciones{/g} de la zona elegida se duplican. Todas las demás zonas tácticas se anulan y no pueden utilizarse en este {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, pero podrán volver a designarse en el próximo asalto.

languages.text: Der {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Großstratege{/g} wählt eines der {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Gefechtstaktiken{/g}-Gebiete aus. Eine {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang werden die {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Boni{/g} des Zielgebiets verdoppelt. Alle anderen taktischen Gebiete werden deaktiviert und können in diesem {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} nicht genutzt werden. In der nächsten Runde können sie dagegen wieder zugeordnet werden.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

traits.locale_text: Der {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Großstratege{/g} wählt eines der Gefechtstaktiken-Gebiete aus. Eine {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang werden die {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Boni{/g} des Zielgebiets verdoppelt. Alle anderen taktischen Gebiete werden deaktiviert und können in diesem {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} nicht genutzt werden. In der nächsten Runde können sie dagegen wieder zugeordnet werden.

languages.text: Le {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}grand stratège{/g} choisit l'une des zones de {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tactiques de combat{/g}. Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, les {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de la zone ciblée sont doublés. Les autres zones tactiques sont toutes déchargées et aucune ne peut être utilisée au cours du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, mais elles peuvent à nouveau être désignées au tour suivant.
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

traits.locale_text: Le Stratège choisit l'une des zones de Tactiques de Combat. Pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, les {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de la zone ciblée sont doublés. Les autres zones tactiques sont toutes déchargées et aucune ne peut être utilisée au cours du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, mais elles peuvent à nouveau être désignées au tour suivant.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}大戦略家{/g}は軍略エリアをひとつ選択する。1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、ターゲットにされたエリアの{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}が倍になる。それ以外の戦術エリアはこの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中は使用できなくなるが、次のラウンドに再度指定できるようになる。
languages.original_text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Grand Strategist{/g} chooses one of the Combat Tactics areas. For 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, the targeted area's {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} are doubled. All other tactical areas are discharged and cannot be used this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, but can be designated again next round.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}大戦略家{/g}は軍略エリアをひとつ選択する。1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、ターゲットにされたエリアの{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}が倍になる。それ以外の戦術エリアはこの{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中は使用できなくなるが、次のラウンドに再度指定できるようになる。

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerStrategistGlossary}Büyük Stratejist{/g}, {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Çatışma Taktikleri{/g} alanlarından birini seçer. Hedeflenen alanın {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusları{/g}, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntluğuna{/g} iki katına çıkar. Diğer tüm taktik alanları ortadan kalkar ve o {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} kullanılamaz ancak bir sonraki rauntta yeniden oluşturulabilirler.
